title: Hyperliquid and Phantom Petition CFTC to Exempt DeFi From Broker Rules
dek: Hyperliquid and Phantom have filed a formal petition asking the CFTC to exempt non-custodial wallets and DeFi from broker rules. The request seeks to codify how the agency treats onchain derivatives. Coverage appears in The Defiant and Cointelegraph.
author: Crypto Cronkite
key_fact: Hyperliquid and Phantom petitioned the CFTC to exempt non-custodial wallets and DeFi from broker rules.
human_take: A policy ask, not a rule change. The desk will be watching what the CFTC actually does with it.
body: Hyperliquid and Phantom have asked the CFTC to exempt non-custodial wallets and DeFi from broker rules, according to The Defiant and Cointelegraph.
The petition seeks to codify exemptions that would shape how the CFTC regulates onchain derivatives.
